items.title: Karnataka Governor suspends KPSC chairperson Shivashankarappa S Sahukar over 'illegal selection' of daughters in government service
items.summary: The Governor recommended to the President that the matter be referred to the Supreme Court under Article 317(1) of the Constitution for an inquiry into the allegations
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Fire tears through Bangkok pub, killing 27 people
items.summary: A fire engulfed a beer hall in Bangkok early Monday, killing at least 27 people and injuring dozens.

items.title: Middle East Updates: Cease-Fire Unraveling as U.S. and Iran Trade Strikes Again
items.summary: The U.S. military said that it had hit dozens of Iranian targets in its latest salvo. Iran’s army said that it had fired more drones at American military sites in the region, as...
